title: linaria saturejoides
intro: Linaria saturejoides, also known as Selfheal or Heal-all, is a perennial herb belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linaria saturejoides include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin irritations and internally to support overall well-being.
